name: instagram-mcp-ai
description: MCP server for the Instagram Platform (Meta Graph API) — professional-account tools.
long_description: instagram-mcp-ai exposes Instagram professional-account (Business/Creator) operations — content publishing, media management, comment moderation, and insights — as safe, well-annotated Model Context Protocol tools. It talks only to official Meta Graph API endpoints (graph.instagram.com, graph.facebook.com), keeps credentials in the OS keychain via Claude Desktop's user configuration, and defaults writes to a preview (plan-and-apply) mode so the model never mutates your account without explicit consent.

IG_ACCESS_TOKEN.title: Instagram access token
IG_ACCESS_TOKEN.description: Long-lived Instagram Login (Path A) access token for your professional account. Obtain it via the Meta Graph API Explorer or your app dashboard — see docs/mcpb-install.md.

IG_ACCOUNT_ID.title: Instagram account ID
IG_ACCOUNT_ID.description: Your Instagram professional-account (Business/Creator) ID. Optional — the server can look it up, but supplying it skips a lookup and disambiguates multiple accounts.

IG_APP_ID.title: Meta app ID
IG_APP_ID.description: Your Meta app ID. Optional — needed only for token refresh, debug_token, and discovery (business_discovery / hashtag search on Path B).

IG_APP_SECRET.title: Meta app secret
IG_APP_SECRET.description: Your Meta app secret. Optional — needed only for token exchange/refresh and appsecret_proof (Path B).

IG_WRITE_MODE.title: Write mode
IG_WRITE_MODE.description: Standing consent for write operations: "preview" (plan only, default) or "apply" (execute writes).

IG_TOOL_PACKAGES.title: Tool packages
IG_TOOL_PACKAGES.description: Which tool packages to load: core | reader | publisher | all, or an explicit comma-separated list.
